title: 学术趋势日报 2026-03-24

signals.label: 视频World Model爆发
signals.summary: WorldCache、VideoDetective、ThinkJEPA等多篇工作同日发布，video understanding与latent world model成为CV新前沿

signals.label: 机器人通用操作突破
signals.summary: UniDex与DexDrummer展示从人类视频学习通用机械手控制，robotics从专用向通用演进

signals.label: VLA模型持续进化
signals.summary: 视觉-语言-动作融合深入，DualCoT-VLA并行推理与UniMotion三模态统一，跨模态推理能力提升

signals.label: 传统NLP任务减少
signals.summary: cs.CL增长主要来自LLM相关，传统NLP任务关注度下降

signals.label: AI伦理风险显现
signals.summary: 可及性与公平性研究开始受到关注，生成式AI社会影响进入学术视野

summary: 今日共发布834篇论文，CV领域持续领跑，paper数达583篇较昨日增加161篇。视频理解与world model成为核心热点，多个相关工作同日发布。机器人控制(RO)领域增长显著，通用机械手控制取得突破。
key_findings: CV领域一日新增161篇论文，占总量70%，视频world model与多模态推理是核心驱动力
机器人控制爆发：UniDex通用机械手控制框架与DexDrummerDexterous机器人鼓手同日发布
VLA(视觉-语言-动作)模型再进化：DualCoT-VLA引入并行推理链，ThinkJEPA探索latent world model
LLM高效适配受关注：Scaling DoRA提出高秩分解适配方法
量子物理上升38篇，凝聚态物理新增相对称性研究
生成式AI伦理风险显现：「Greater accessibility can amplify discrimination」揭示可及性提升可能加剧歧视
数学应用与计算物理各有进展，NMR光谱预测与RNA蛋白结合建模
CS.AI领域增长53篇至192篇，AI整体研究持续扩张

notable_papers.title: WorldCache: Content-Aware Caching for Accelerated Video World Models
notable_papers.reason: 视频world model加速推理提出content-aware caching，video understanding核心突破

notable_papers.title: VideoDetective: Clue Hunting via both Extrinsic Query and Intrinsic Relevance for Long Video Understanding
notable_papers.reason: 长视频理解新范式，结合外部查询与内在相关性进行线索追踪

notable_papers.title: ThinkJEPA: Empowering Latent World Models with Large Vision-Language Reasoning Model
notable_papers.reason: latent world model新思路，融合VL reasoning提升世界模型表示能力

notable_papers.title: DualCoT-VLA: Visual-Linguistic Chain of Thought via Parallel Reasoning for Vision-Language-Action Models
notable_papers.reason: VLA模型推理链新设计，parallel reasoning提升多模态决策效率

notable_papers.title: UniMotion: A Unified Framework for Motion-Text-Vision Understanding and Generation
notable_papers.reason: 运动-文本-视觉统一框架，三模态理解与生成融合

notable_papers.title: UniDex: A Robot Foundation Suite for Universal Dexterous Hand Control from Egocentric Human Videos
notable_papers.reason: 通用机械手控制foundation model，从人类egocentric video学习

notable_papers.title: DexDrummer: In-Hand, Contact-Rich, and Long-Horizon Dexterous Robot Drumming
notable_papers.reason: Dexterous manipulation突破，高接触、长时域机器人演奏任务

notable_papers.title: Scaling DoRA: High-Rank Adaptation via Factored Norms and Fused Kernels
notable_papers.reason: DoRA高效微调新方法，高秩分解与融合核提升适配效率

notable_papers.title: Greater accessibility can amplify discrimination in generative AI
notable_papers.reason: AI伦理重要工作，揭示可及性提升可能加剧生成式AI中的歧视问题
